title: lilac × rothomagensis
intro: Lilac × rothomagensis, also known as the lilac hybrid or Rothomagus lilac, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross-breeding of lilac (Syringa spp.) and Rothomagus (an extinct genus of plants closely related to lilac). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lilac × rothomagensis include reducing stress, anxiety, and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
